title: Galbi Korean BBQ Short Ribs

seo.title: How to Make Galbi Korean BBQ Short Ribs — Easy Korean Recipe

description: Galbi Korean BBQ Short Ribs are a quintessential Korean dish featuring tender, marinated beef short ribs grilled to perfection. The sweet and savory marinade, often made with soy sauce, garlic, and fruit, infuses the meat with incredible flavor. It's a beloved centerpiece for any Korean feast, often served with rice and various banchan.

instructions.title: Prepare the Short Ribs
instructions.text: Gently rinse the flanken-cut short ribs under cold water and pat them thoroughly dry with paper towels. If using thicker bone-in short ribs, butterfly them to about 1/2 inch thickness for even cooking.

instructions.title: Make the Galbi Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, brown sugar, mirin, sesame oil, minced garlic, grated fresh ginger, grated Asian pear, grated onion, black pepper, and water until the sugar is fully dissolved and all ingredients are well combined.

instructions.title: Marinate the Ribs
instructions.text: Place the prepared short ribs into the marinade, ensuring each piece is fully coated. Cover the bowl or transfer to a large resealable bag. Marinate in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight for best flavor.

instructions.title: Preheat Grill or Broiler
instructions.text: When ready to cook, preheat your outdoor grill to medium-high heat or preheat your oven broiler. Lightly oil the grill grates or broiler pan to prevent sticking.

instructions.title: Grill the Galbi
instructions.text: Remove the ribs from the marinade, allowing any excess to drip off. Grill the short ribs for 3-5 minutes per side, depending on thickness and desired doneness. For broiler, cook 4-6 minutes per side, flipping once, until nicely caramelized and cooked through.

instructions.title: Rest and Serve
instructions.text: Transfer the cooked Galbi to a cutting board and let them rest for 5 minutes before slicing against the grain into individual rib pieces or smaller portions. Garnish with chopped green onions and toasted sesame seeds. Serve immediately with rice and banchan.

tips: For the most authentic flavor, use a whole Asian pear or a small amount of kiwi in the marinade to tenderize the meat naturally. If unavailable, a touch of pineapple juice can work.
Ensure the short ribs are flanken-cut, meaning they are cut across the bone into thin strips. This allows for quicker cooking and better marinade absorption.
Galbi is best served hot off the grill with a side of steamed white rice, ssamjang (Korean dipping sauce), and various banchan (side dishes) like kimchi or pickled radish.
article: Galbi Korean BBQ Short Ribs is a beloved Korean Dinner Recipes dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
